answers: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS. Providers: AWS, Azure, GCP. Start with AWS Free Tier.
Cloud computing = renting computing power over the internet. Types: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS. Top providers: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud.
AWS leads the market, Azure is preferred in enterprises, and GCP is strong in AI/ML. Start with AWS Free Tier to get hands-on experience.
Cloud basics: infrastructure, platforms, and software delivered as a service. Get started with AWS Free Tier and aim for the AWS Cloud Practitioner cert.
